documentation.description:
-----------------------------------------------------------------
  The abstract PDF output stream root type.                    --
  From this package, you can use the following derived types:  --
     * PDF_Out_File    : output in a file                      --
     * PDF_Out_String  : output in a string                    --
  Of course you can define your own derived types.             --
-----------------------------------------------------------------

simple_types.name: Font_Type
simple_types.code:
type Font_Type is
   (
    Courier,
    Courier_Bold,
    Courier_Bold_Oblique,
    Courier_Oblique,
    Helvetica,
    Helvetica_Bold,
    Helvetica_Bold_Oblique,
    Helvetica_Oblique,
    …,
    External_Font);

enumeration_literals.name: Zapf_Dingbats
enumeration_literals.description: Fonts imported into the PDF document

documentation.description:
Rule to determine how to fill areas within a (non-trivial) path.
See 8.5.3.3.2 and 8.5.3.3.3 of PDF specification

simple_types.name: Rendering_Mode
simple_types.code:
type Rendering_Mode is
  (fill, stroke, fill_then_stroke, invisible,
   fill_and_add_to_path,
   stroke_and_add_to_path,
   fill_then_stroke_and_add_to_path,
   add_to_path);

enumeration_literals.name: invisible
enumeration_literals.description: Same, but also add text to path for clipping.

record_types.name: Color_Type
Margins_Type
Point
Rectangle

tagged_types.name: PDF_Out_File
tagged_types.code: type PDF_Out_File is new PDF_Out_Stream with private;

tagged_types.name: PDF_Out_Stream
tagged_types.code: type PDF_Out_Stream is abstract tagged private;

tagged_types.name: PDF_Out_String
tagged_types.code: type PDF_Out_String is new PDF_Out_Stream with private;

subtypes.name: Path_Rendering_Mode
subtypes.code: subtype Path_Rendering_Mode is Rendering_Mode range fill .. fill_then_stroke;

subtypes.name: Standard_Font_Type
subtypes.code: subtype Standard_Font_Type is Font_Type range Courier .. Zapf_Dingbats;

constants.name: cm_2_5_margins
constants.code: cm_2_5_margins : constant Margins_Type := (cm_2_5, cm_2_5, cm_2_5, cm_2_5);
